news.headline: 9 days left to register for webinar on hidden ranking factors for SEO growth in 2025 hosted by Liquid Web.
news.summary: A webinar titled "Mastering Hidden Ranking Factors for Rapid Organic Growth" will be hosted by Liquid Web, a prominent provider of premium hosting for small to midsize businesses based in Atlanta on December 3, 2024. Top SEO experts will come together to explore and utilize obscure ranking elements aimed at achieving accelerated organic growth.

news.headline: Arrival Home Loans launches Arrival Fund I, offering investors 10% annualized return on new bridge loan fund.
news.summary: Novato, California - On December 2, 2024, Arrival Home Loans, a division of Pacific Private Money, Inc., revealed the introduction of Arrival Fund I, LLC. This innovative residential bridge loan lending fund aims to cater to the rising need for short-term bridge loans in the current market.

news.headline: TICE Florida, a Popeyes restaurant portfolio acquired by AIM Capital, appoints Thomas Stager as CEO.
news.summary: In Miami on December 3, 2024, TICE Florida, a well-known collection of Popeyes eateries that was recently bought by AIM Capital, revealed the selection of Thomas Stager as the new Chief Executive Officer. Stager, recognized for his expertise in the Quick Service Restaurant (QSR) sector, will lead the company in its future endeavors.

news.headline: Biden plan aims to end waiver allowing disabled workers to be paid below minimum wage.
news.summary: A proposal from the Biden administration aims to eliminate a provision permitting employers to pay disabled workers less than the federal minimum wage.

news.headline: Implications of novice Trump Cabinet on geopolitics discussed as it may affect international relations.
Arkestro partners with Infor Marketplace for procurement integration, enhancing business growth. - Dec. 3, 2024.
news.summary: A company specializing in Predictive Procurement Orchestration (PPO) has joined forces with Infor Marketplace to transform the role of procurement in driving business expansion. This partnership, revealed on December 3, 2024, in San Francisco, marks an important collaboration between Arkestro and the Infor Marketplace.

news.headline: Global resistant starch market to reach $21.96 billion by 2035 as per The Insight Partners report.
news.summary: On December 3, 2024, a recent report by The Insight Partners revealed significant growth in the global Resistant Starch Market. The report predicts growth trends, shares analysis of key players, and provides a forecast up to 2031. The rising focus on...

news.headline: Joe Webb promoted to Chief Executive Officer at Duffy's Sports Grill in Lake Worth, Florida after serving as President for five years.
news.summary: On December 3, 2024, in Lake Worth, Florida, a family-owned restaurant group called Duffy's Sports Grill revealed the promotion of Joe Webb as their new Chief Executive Officer. After serving as the President for five years, Joe has been instrumental in the company's growth and success. With this promotion, Joe will now lead the company towards further achievements and milestones.

news.headline: ExxonMobil Upstream president to retire in 2025, new president appointed. Barry L. Engle as LCS president. VP for Exxon Mobil.
news.summary: In Spring, Texas, it has been announced that ExxonMobil (NYSE: XOM) will see the retirement of Liam M. Mallon, who currently serves as the president of ExxonMobil Upstream Company and vice president of Exxon Mobil Corporation, effective from February 1, 2025. As a replacement, Dan L. Ammann has been appointed as the new president of ExxonMobil Upstream Company, while also continuing in his role as vice president of Exxon Mobil Corporation to succeed Liam. Moreover, Barry L. Engle has been appointed as the new president of Low Carbon Solutions (LCS) and vice president of Exxon Mobil C.

news.headline: Ondo Finance tokenization crypto (ONDO) with BlackRock ties surges 38%, price at $1.71, market cap $2.2B.
news.summary: Ondo Finance (CRYPTO: ONDO), a tokenization-themed cryptocurrency associated with BlackRock, has experienced a notable surge of over 35% in the past 24 hours. As of the latest data, ONDO is priced at $1.71 with a market capitalization of $2.2 billion. Its performance trend over the last 24 hours shows an increase of +38.9%, and over the past seven days, it has surged by +75.4%.Comparatively, Maker (CRYPTO: MKR) is currently trading at $2,178.34, with a market capitalization of $1.9 billion, showcasing a positive trend of +14.6% in the last 24 hours and +26.7% over the past week. On the other hand, MANTRA (CRYPTO: OM) stands at a price of $3.85 and a market cap of $3.5 billion. Its 24-hour performance indicates a rise of +10%, while the 7-day trend shows a growth of +7.9%.It is worth noting the significant movement in the cryptocurrency market, particularly with ONDO Finance leading the way with its substantial surge. The crypto industry continues to attract attention and investment, with ONDO Finance making notable progress within a short timeframe.

news.headline: Kalmar Corp announced a share buyback program on 3.12.2024.
ParkHelp introduces Tariff Protection Plan to solidify 2025-2026 project pricing, shielding parking owners from pending tariffs.
news.summary: ParkHelp Technologies has announced the launch of a new Tariff Protection Plan in response to the potential impact of looming tariffs on parking and security initiatives. The plan aims to alleviate the financial strain caused by these tariffs for businesses. The company hopes to assist in minimizing the impact on projects by offering a strategic solution. This initiative comes at a crucial time as businesses navigate economic uncertainties.

news.headline: Elastic enhances cloud detection & response with single SIEM, offers agentless ingestion, graph view.
news.summary: Elastic Security, a leading company traded on the NYSE under the symbol ESTC, headquartered in San Francisco, recently disclosed advancements in its cloud detection and response (CDR) abilities within its Elastic Security platform. These enhancements aim to diminish tool fragmentation and enhance cloud security efficiency by providing a comprehensive solution through a single Security Information and Event Management (SIEM) system. The updated features encompass agentless ingestion, cloud asset inventory management, extended protective measures, and a graphical representation allowing for immediate correlation and context amplification utilizing user-generated data. By alleviating the need for multiple security tools, Elastic's solution is designed to simplify cloud security management and empower organizations with a holistic security approach.

news.headline: Retail giants offer same-day delivery to boost sales; Amazon, Walmart, Target aiming to increase orders and revenue.
news.summary: Major retailers such as Amazon, Walmart, and Target have discovered that delivering online orders to customers on the same day can lead to increased future spending. This strategy exploits the tendency of customers to make additional purchases once they receive their initial order promptly. By offering quick delivery services, these retailers have seen a notable rise in customer spending levels post-receipt of same-day orders.

news.headline: TransMedics appoints new CFO Gerardo Hernandez, tightens 2024 revenue goals; Stephen Gordon to stay until March 31, 2025.
news.summary: TransMedics Group, Inc. (NASDAQ:TMDX) is experiencing a decline in premarket trading today following the announcement of Gerardo Hernandez being appointed as the new Chief Financial Officer, effective December 2, 2024. This move comes as Stephen Gordon steps down from the CFO role and transitions to a non-executive position until March 31, 2025, for a smooth handover. Waleed Hassanein, M.D., the President and CEO of the company, expressed his excitement about Hernandez joining the leadership team. The full details can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: AST SpaceMobile and Cadence are collaborating to develop the AST5000 ASIC chip, aiming to provide high-speed satellite internet to smartphones globally.
news.summary: AST SpaceMobile, Inc. (NASDAQ: ASTS) has announced a strategic partnership with Cadence Design Systems, Inc. (NASDAQ: CDNS) to advance their goal of closing global connectivity disparities. The collaboration is focused on providing rapid space-based internet access directly to regular smartphones to improve international communication. Together, Cadence and AST SpaceMobile have created the AST5000 ASIC, a specialized, energy-efficient chip crucial to AST's innovative BlueBird initiative. This cutting-edge ASIC boosts processing bandwidth by up to ten times per satellite, facilitating the provision of smooth, space-based cellular broadband services on a worldwide scale. The AST5000 ASIC integration signifies a significant step forward in revolutionizing global connectivity.

news.headline: Boston Mutual Life Insurance appoints Grant D. Ward as President. 8th in 133-year history. - PRNewswire, Dec. 3, 2024.
news.summary: In the historic 133-year run of Boston Mutual Life Insurance Company, a leading national life insurance carrier, the recent appointment of Grant D. Ward, Sr. marks the eighth president to take the helm. Headquartered in Canton, Mass., the company offers insurance solutions catering to individuals and workplaces. This move was officially disclosed on Dec. 3, 2024, emphasizing the continued evolution and leadership changes within the longstanding organization.

news.headline: English Language Learning market projected to reach $91.1B by 2031 - per new report by Meticulous Research®.
news.summary: On December 3, 2024, in Redding, California, a recent market study unveiled insights on the English Language Learning Market. The comprehensive report explores factors such as market size, share, forecasting, and trends analysis methodology across various learning modes including blended, offline, and online platforms. It assesses different learning modes, age groups, end users (individual learners, educational institutions, corporate organizations), and geographical regions. The study also delves into the technological advancements impacting the market landscape.

news.headline: Bank of Korea monetary policy board to meet early on Wednesday morning to discuss market stabilizing measures - BoK.
Lexitas is named to Inc.'s 2024 Best in Business List for Business Services and Operational Excellence.
news.summary: On December 3, 2024, in Houston, Lexitas, a prominent company offering technology-driven litigation services and a part of funds managed by Apax, proudly revealed its inclusion in the annual list recognizing top-performing companies in the industry. This acknowledgment highlights Lexitas' excellence in its field.

news.headline: Tim Sharp has been named as the new Brand President of Urban Air Adventure Park, part of Unleashed Brands.
news.summary: In Dallas on December 3, 2024, Urban Air Adventure Park, a premier indoor adventure park operator and a segment of the youth enrichment growth-driven platform Unleashed Brands, revealed Tim Sharp as the new Brand President. Sharp, who has been associated with Urban Air since 2019, will now lead the organization.

news.headline: South Korea ruling party head says martial law has lost effect - YTN.
Nature's Sunshine partners with Cirque Series mountain race series in the US, to push Peaks 2025-2027. $NATR #partnership.
news.summary: In Lehi, Utah on December 3, 2024, Nature’s Sunshine Products, Inc. revealed their collaboration with Cirque Series, the top mountain race series in the U.S. Nature’s Sunshine, a prominent producer of premium herbal and nutritional supplements, joins forces with Cirque Series to enhance their offerings. This partnership signifies a significant move for Nature’s Sunshine, a company listed on NASDAQ under the ticker NATR. This agreement marks a strategic alignment between a leading supplement manufacturer and a prestigious mountain race series, showcasing the potential for mutual growth and success.

news.headline: Fear culture blamed for crisis in UK stats agency.TRL shows data manipulation by 10% of staff causing 5% errors.
UFCW Local 360 successfully unionizes Fresh Elizabeth LLC in New Jersey, attracting new members as the only outlet for multi-state operator Fresh.
news.summary: In West Berlin, New Jersey, UFCW Local 360 revealed that their efforts to organize the state's cannabis sector have yielded positive results, with new members joining even as 2024 comes to a close. The most recent approval for union participation with UFCW Local 360 occurred at Fresh Elizabeth LLC dispensary in Elizabeth. Fresh Elizabeth LLC is the exclusive outlet in New Jersey for Fresh, a cannabis operator present in multiple states such as Colorado and Delaware. This development underscores the ongoing success of UFCW Local 360 in expanding its membership in the cannabis industry.

news.headline: ZIPS Car Wash Convos™ Season 3 showcases Kelvin Banks Jr., UT tackle, with host Ray Villareal. Episode released in Austin.
news.summary: In the upcoming Season 3 of ZIPS "Car Wash Convos™," an episode set in Austin, Texas will showcase Ray Villareal, a returning host and Texas alum. This episode marks the first University of Texas feature in the series. Scheduled to air on December 3, 2024, the Texas Longhorns Football Offensive will be the center of discussion in this exciting installment. Stay tuned for this special Texas-themed episode showcasing the unique perspectives and insights of the featured guests.

news.headline: MainStreet Bank's holiday program Making Change brings joy to local animals in 2024 FAIRFAX, Va, Nasdaq: MNSB Raised gapru $100k PRNewswire
news.summary: MainStreet Bancshares, Inc., the financial holding company for MainStreet Bank, is introducing the Making Change program, where employees can direct their donations. This program aims to bring joy to furry friends during this giving season. The announcement was made in Fairfax, Va., on December 3, 2024. Notably, MainStreet Bancshares, Inc. is listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbols MNSB & MNSBP. This initiative reflects the spirit of giving as employees participate in supporting charitable causes.

news.headline: South Korea martial law forces withdrawing from parliament - Chosun.
Intel is looking for a new CEO after Pat Gelsinger's departure. Investors in Intel stock should take note.
news.summary: A search for a new CEO has commenced at Intel after the unexpected exit of Pat Gelsinger. Investors holding Intel stock should be aware of this development. It is essential to stay informed about the progress of this search and the impact it may have on the company. Intel plays a significant role in the technology sector, with a market capitalization of approximately $200 billion. The departure of Gelsinger raises questions about the future leadership and direction of the company, which could potentially influence stock prices and investor confidence. Stay tuned for updates on this crucial situation.

news.headline: Janux Therapeutics shares surge 70% with new prostate cancer treatment results, Vir also sees beneficial impact.
news.summary: Janux Therapeutics saw a significant surge in its shares on Tuesday following remarkable results for its experimental treatment for prostate cancer. The stock catapulted by an impressive 70% due to what was described as unparalleled outcomes in the clinical trial. This sudden increase in value generated substantial interest from investors, with the company experiencing a surge in trading activity. The success of the treatment led to a positive trend in the market perception of Janux Therapeutics, as the company's innovative approach to fighting prostate cancer garnered attention and confidence from stakeholders.

news.headline: Coupang stock drops as South Korean President declares martial law, accusing opposition of insurgency plot. Stocks with ties to South Korea fall.
news.summary: On Tuesday, President Yoon Suk Yeol of South Korea declared a state of "emergency martial law", alleging that the political opposition was scheming an insurgency. In response, stocks linked to South Korea experienced a notable decline, with e-commerce frontrunner Coupang among those affected. The company's stock witnessed a decrease following the President's announcement.

news.headline: MP Materials stock surges amid supply of rare earth materials to U.S., protected from Chinese export controls.
news.summary: Shares of MP Materials are surging due to advancements in supplying rare earth materials to U.S. customers independently from Chinese export restrictions. The stock has witnessed a significant increase amidst China's implementation of export controls.

news.headline: VIZpin expands Entegrity Smart brand with Video Intercom Panel for Visitor Management & Access Control Solutions.
news.summary: VIZpin recently unveiled a new addition to its Entegrity Smart line of Visitor Management and Access Control Solutions, a Video Intercom Panel, designed to enhance security for multifamily properties. This affordable system offers a quick and easy installation process, providing convenience for property owners and managers. The announcement was made in Lancaster, Pennsylvania on December 3, 2024. This development showcases VIZpin's commitment to improving security measures, with the new Video Intercom Panel being a key component.

news.headline: Woolpert & Black & Veatch JV wins $94.5M contract to support US military branches in 30 European countries.
news.summary: A joint venture between Woolpert and Black & Veatch has been awarded a five-year contract by the U.S. Army Corps of Engineers Europe District to support military branches in 30 European countries. The contract, announced in Wiesbaden, Germany on December 3, 2024, aims to provide architecture services and will benefit various U.S. military branches operating in Europe.

news.headline: Concord Technologies partners with Konica Minolta Healthcare for improved data delivery and document processing in Seattle.
news.summary: Seattle-based Concord Technologies has recently announced a strategic partnership with Konica Minolta Healthcare. This collaboration is set to enhance data delivery and improve intelligent document processing in healthcare services. The partnership aims to streamline operations and increase efficiency in handling medical documents. This move signifies a significant step towards digital transformation in the healthcare sector by leveraging the expertise of both companies. Stay tuned for more information on this promising collaboration.

news.headline: Integris partners with OMERS Private Equity for growth; OMERS is one of Canada's largest pension funds.
news.summary: On December 3, 2024, Integris, an IT Managed Service Provider based in Cranbury, New Jersey, revealed a new partnership with OMERS Private Equity. OMERS Private Equity is a major institutional investor and the private equity investment branch of OMERS, a prominent Canadian pension plan that serves as one of the largest defined benefit schemes in Canada.

news.headline: ComEd and Metro Mayors Caucus team up for 20 Northern Illinois communities to become EV ready with technical assistance.
news.summary: In Chicago, ComEd and the Metropolitan Mayors Caucus revealed the 3rd group of communities joining the EV Readiness Program. This initiative aims to assist local governments in getting ready for the increasing adoption of electric vehicles (EVs) and charging infrastructure. A total of 20 communities have been selected to receive technical support through this program, allowing them to enhance their policies and adopt best practices for seamless integration of EVs into their regions.

news.headline: Peace advocate Erica Ford launches self-published book, "The Peace Doctor's Playbook," celebrating 37 years, focusing on empowerment and inspiration.
news.summary: On December 3, 2024, in New York, Erica Ford, a respected peace advocate and founder of LIFE Camp Inc., marked 37 years of commitment to promoting peace. As part of her celebration, she released her own interactive journal titled "The Peace Doctor's Playbook: 365 Days to a..."

news.headline: 250-firm accounting franchise Padgett addresses post-election tax challenges at annual conference; focuses on changes ahead without tax elimination on tips.
news.summary: Upcoming tax adjustments are on the horizon, with expectations not aligning with previous pledges such as the removal of taxes on tips. Atlanta, Dec. 3, 2024 - Padgett, a prominent tax and accounting franchise catering to small businesses and individuals throughout North America, hosted its annual FOCUS Tax Seminar. The event shed light on potential changes in tax policies, with significant numbers likely to be affected.

news.headline: Omron's NX Series Safety Controllers in Fort Worth, Texas offer versatile solutions for industrial safety, efficiency, and risk mitigation.
news.summary: Omron's NX Series safety controllers, based in FORT WORTH, Texas, introduced on Dec. 3, offer a range of integrated features aimed at addressing typical industrial issues. These controllers are tailored to meet strict safety standards, manage risks effectively, and enhance operational productivity.

news.headline: Lightbeam Health, Primary Partners, and AFCH win 2024 SDOH Points of Light Award from KLAS Research for addressing patients' social needs effectively.
news.summary: In Dallas, Lightbeam Health Solutions, a prominent provider of population health technology, along with Primary Partners, a Florida-based group of over 750 independent physicians, and Alliance for Community Health (AFCH), a nonprofit organization in Florida, have received the prestigious 2024 SDOH Points of Light award from KLAS Research. This recognition acknowledges their success in providing quality care to patients while also focusing on addressing their social determinants of health (SDOH). The 2024 SDOH Points of Light Report highlights their effective strategies in this area. This achievement showcases their dedication to holistic patient care and commitment to improving community health outcomes.

news.headline: A. Menarini Diagnostics partners with Sinocare for exclusive distribution of new CGM System in reimbursed markets.
news.summary: In Florence, Italy on December 3, 2024, A. Menarini Diagnostics has revealed an exclusive Distribution Agreement with Sinocare. This agreement will involve handling the registration, promotion, distribution, and marketing of the latest Sinocare 3rd Generation Continuous Glucose Monitoring (CGM) System within reimbursed markets. This collaboration marks a significant step in the industry.

news.headline: Akima receives 2025 Military Friendly® designation, excelling in veteran hiring with commitment to support transitions.
news.summary: Herndon, Virginia - On December 3, 2024, Akima, a leading company offering products and services to the federal government, was honored with the prestigious 2025 Military Friendly® designation. This acknowledgment highlights Akima's dedication to aiding veterans in transitioning into civilian life.

news.headline: Mouser Electronics partners with DS PENSKE for Formula E Season 11 debut in Brazil on Dec. 7, sponsored for 2024/2025 season in collaboration with TTI, Inc., Molex, and KYOCERA AVX.
news.summary: Mouser Electronics, Inc., based in Dallas and Fort Worth, Texas, is set to sponsor the DS PENSKE Formula E racing team as they kick off Season 11 at the Sambadrome in São Paulo, Brazil on December 7. The sponsorship covers the entire 2024/2025 ABB FIA Formula E World Championship season and is a joint effort with TTI, Inc., as well as leading manufacturers Molex and KYOCERA AVX. This marks the first collaboration of its kind in Brazil.

news.headline: South Korea Parliament Speaker asks police to leave parliament.
Perry Homes buys MasterCraft Builder Group in Florida, increasing operations in the region. Todd Chachere, CEO, excited about the move.
news.summary: Houston-based Perry Homes, one of the leading privately held homebuilders in the United States, revealed the purchase of MasterCraft Builder Group, a renowned homebuilder in the Jacksonville, Florida area. The acquisition was announced by Perry Homes' CEO, Todd Chachere, who expressed excitement about the move. This strategic acquisition aims to boost growth for Perry Homes, with the addition of MasterCraft Builder Group's expertise and market presence. This acquisition positions Perry Homes strongly in the Florida region and marks a significant milestone in their expansion plans.

news.headline: South Korea Parliament Speaker: The martial law declaration is invalid.
Zoe's Meats donates nitrite-free meats to Redwood Empire Food Bank, providing 48,000 meals to the community.
news.summary: In a generous gesture of gratitude, Zoe's Meats, an artisan cured meat company based in Petaluma, California, has donated nitrite-free meats to the Redwood Empire Food Bank. This donation will help provide an astonishing 48,000 meals for individuals in need. Zoe's Meats is committed to supporting the local community and making a positive impact through their philanthropic efforts.

news.headline: Subaru of America reports record November 2024 sales with 8.2% increase, reaching 57,690 vehicles sold.
news.summary: Subaru of America, Inc. announced a significant milestone of 28 consecutive months of year-over-year monthly growth, with November setting a new record of 8.2% increase in monthly sales. The Crosstrek and Solterra models achieved their best-ever performance in November. Year-to-date sales exhibit a 5.5% growth, totaling 57,690 vehicles. This impressive streak positions Subaru as a thriving player in the automotive market.

news.headline: CloudZero introduces AI system to optimize cloud costs, integrates with Advisor tool for predictions.
news.summary: CloudZero Intelligence, an innovative AI system, strengthens CloudZero's main platform and drives Advisor, a complimentary tool for forecasting and improving cloud infrastructure expenses. The company, based in Boston, made this announcement on December 3, 2024. CloudZero is recognized globally as a leading provider of proactive solutions for cloud cost efficiency.
